metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_617
metadata.comment:
Rationale: This study decribes components of the PSD fraction separated by either 2D gel electrophoresis and identified by MS/MS (table 1) or by ICAT LC-MS/MS (table 3).
For proteins coming from datasets derived from PSD (detergent-resistant synaptic junctions) preparations without defined selection / enrichment of the pre- or postsynaptic compartment we cannot assign these proteins to excitatory and/or inhibitory nor to the presynapse or / and postsynapse without further information.

12/6/2017 Pim
- The NCBInr protein sequence with id 20864488 was traced back to current rat Uniprot protein sequence wiith accession 'P19945'. A single significant rat hit was returned with score:
E-value: 0.0
Score: 1594
Ident.: 100.0%
Positives : 100.0%
Query Length: 317
Match Length: 317. Experimental description: "In brief, in the original method, forebrains of 30 days old untreated rats were homogenized in homogenization buffer ..". P. 988
